LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_ZonesPlans.label: Zones/Plans
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_ZonesPlans.description: Flesh growth areas and colony construction plans.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_HemogelExtraction.desc: Organs that create hemogel from digestion, photosynthesis, and aquatic filtering.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Structures.label: Structures
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Production.label: Production
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Production.description: Organs that produce, process, store, or refine resources.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Auxiliary.label: Auxiliary
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Auxiliary.description: Utility organs that stabilize and maintain the colony.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Genetics.label: Genetics
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Anomaly.label: Anomaly
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Anomaly.description: Living containment organs for captured entities.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Defense.label: Defense
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Defense.description: Organs grown to maim, repel, or consume intruders.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Reproduction.label: Reproduction
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Reproduction.descripti: Organs that grow, incubate, or command living defenders.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Plants.label: Plants
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Plants.description: Living colony flora grown directly from flesh terrain.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Transport.label: Transport
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Transport.description: Organs that move the colony through flesh and distance.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_FleshMoon.label: Flesh moon
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_FleshMoon.description: Functions sustained by the permanent link to the flesh moon.
LanguageData.FB_FleshArchitect_Misc.label: Misc
